items.title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.summary: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.

items.title: Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
items.summary: Two crew members of the Apache helicopter that crashed following the attack were rescued by an American sea drone.

items.title: Sea drone rescues US army helicopter crew near Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 不放棄國防自主！空巴攜手德企提新世代戰機備案  德空軍傾向先買F-35
items.summary: 在備受矚目的法德戰機計畫宣告破局後，一家參與其中的公司9日向法新社透露，由空中巴士（Airbus）領軍的一個財團，已提議開發一款新世代戰鬥機。  此前一天，由於參與計畫的...…

items.title: 遭到遺棄聖母峰6天奇蹟生還 尼泊爾登山界要求徹查
items.summary: 家屬今天表示，一名遭到遺棄、花6天自行脫離聖母峰惡劣環境而生還獲救的尼泊爾登山客，已經從加護病房轉到普通病房，身體正在逐漸康復。當地登山界要求徹查這起事件。  法新社報導，他令人難以置信...…

items.title: 作為貿易談判一環！彭博：台灣擬與美同步 全面管制AI晶片出口中國
items.summary: 彭博依據知情者報導，台灣政府考慮對中國的人工智慧（AI）晶片銷售採取更嚴格的出口管制，以與美國的措施步調一致。此舉旨在解決半導體走私中國的問題，但恐激怒北京。  報導說，此...…
